spec.name: parallel_draft_reviewer
spec.description: Spawn one reviewer subagent per draft file to find the single misspelling in each, then return the corrected word for each draft.

draft_paths.description: List of absolute paths to draft files.

corrections.description: Mapping from draft filename to corrected word.

spec.implementation_notes: For each draft path, spawn a lightweight LLM call that reads the file, identifies the single misspelled word, and returns the correct spelling. Aggregate results into a corrections dict.

request.rationale: The objective requires dispatching one reviewer agent per draft in parallel to find misspellings. I lack a subagent dispatch tool. This request provisions exactly that capability, enabling parallel review of all 6 drafts within the remaining iteration budget.

subagent.task: The objective requires dispatching one reviewer agent per draft in parallel to find misspellings. I lack a subagent dispatch tool. This request provisions exactly that capability, enabling parallel review of all 6 drafts within the remaining iteration budget.
